metadata.description: Community Hattrick.org knowledge pack for AI assistants. Game mechanics, training, tactics, economy, and youth academy guidance sourced from the official rulebook, the Unwritten Manual, the developer blog, and community research.

plugins.name: hattrick-context-pack
plugins.description: Expert Hattrick.org online football manager assistant. Training, match tactics, formations, economy, youth academy, cups, and national teams. Optional language packs under skills/hattrick/references/languages/.
